tools.name: perp_get_funding_rates
tools.description:
Use this when you need current perpetual futures funding rates for a single asset across exchanges. Returns rates comparison in JSON.

1. symbol: trading pair symbol
2. rates: array per exchange with exchange name, current funding rate, annualized rate
3. openInterest: open interest in USD per excha

tools.name: perp_get_funding_rates
tools.description:
Use this when you need current perpetual futures funding rates for a single asset across exchanges. Returns rates comparison in JSON. POST variant of perp_get_funding_rates -- same params passed as JSON body instead of query string.

1. symbol: trading pair symbol
2. rates: array per exchange with e

findings.title: Toxic flow: untrusted input can reach an external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: perp_get_funding_rates · Public sink: perp_get_funding_rates.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: perp_get_funding_rates · Public sink: perp_get_funding_rates

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.

findings.title: Tool description changed since last scan
findings.detail: Tool "perp_get_funding_rates" changed its description with no version change. Silent description changes are how a trusted server turns malicious after review.

evidence.snippet:
before: "Use this when you need current perpetual futures funding rates for a single asset across exchanges. Returns rates comparison in JSON.

1. symbol: trading pair symbol
2. rates: array per exchange with exchange name, current funding rate, annualized rate
3. openInterest: open interest in USD per excha" → after: "Use this when you need current perpetual futures funding rates for a single asset across exchanges. Returns rates comparison in JSON. POST variant of perp_get_funding_rates -- same params passed as JSON body instead of query string.

1. symbol: trading pair symbol
2. rates: array per exchange with e"

findings.remediation: Re-review the tool before continuing to trust it.
